source_jobs.title: Sales Lead (SAP)
source_jobs.description:
Why Technitask

Technitask is a Canadian company and a trusted provider of IT management, systems integration, software delivery, and consulting services. Our expert team of SAP functional consultants, developers, project managers, data engineers, and security analysts create value for customers in the utilities, telecommunications, and public services sectors. We work with our clients to discover and define business problems, then collaborate with them to implement people, process, and technology solutions to realize benefits across the business.

We bring SAP technical expertise across technical PMO, architecture, integration, data & reporting, security, custom development, system build & administration, and testing.

We’ve worked with some of the biggest enterprises in utilities and the public sector such as Hydro One, Liberty Utilities, the Government of Canada, and the Province of Ontario.

We’re a team of 50+ staff and a network of 200+ alumni with 17+ years of experience delivering SAP solutions.



What You’ll Do

 - Identify and pursue new business opportunities in the SAP ecosystem, driving revenue growth for Technitask Inc.

 - Identify and pursue new business opportunities in cyber and cloud.

 - Build relationships with prospective clients, leveraging your existing network to open doors and create opportunities.

 - Represent Technitask Inc. at industry events, conferences, and networking forums to expand visibility and generate leads.

 - Develop and execute sales strategies that align with company objectives and market trends to ultimately win work with existing and new customers.

 - Maintain a strong pipeline of qualified prospects and manage the full sales cycle from initial contact to contract closure.

 - Partner directly with SAP contacts to identify joint opportunities and strengthen Technitask Inc.’s positioning in the marketplace.

 - Help develop Technitask’s partner network of complimentary firms to tackle larger and broader initiatives.

 - This is a sales hunting and closing role. You should be comfortable with cold calls, back-ground research, gathering customer and market intelligence and converting cold calls and warm clients into actual contracts. You will have support from our executive, sales and marketing and RFP response teams, but your primary goal should be identifying clients, contacting them, qualifying them and arranging meetings between our executive and pre-sales teams. You will build client trust, client specific strategies and approaches to address client specific needs with Technitask resources and solutions and bring the sales cycle to a positive close handing over delivery and account management to other teams.



What You’ll Need

 - Proven track record in SAP sales, with experience closing complex deals and managing enterprise-level clients.

 - Previous experience as an executive at a consulting firm or in IT sales, with exposure to SAP-related solutions.

 - Strong understanding of SAP products, services, and market dynamics.

 - Extensive professional network, ideally including direct contacts within SAP and across industries that rely on SAP solutions.

 - Extensive network of past, new and potential clients interested in doing business with a smaller firm to get the work done faster and more economically than the competition.

 - Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills, with the ability to engage C-level executives.

 - Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.

 - A results-driven mindset with a focus on achieving and exceeding sales targets.



Who You Are

 - A sales professional with deep expertise in SAP and enterprise technology solutions.

 - Entrepreneurial and proactive, with the ability to spot opportunities and act quickly to capitalize on them.

 - Highly connected, with a strong network of industry contacts and direct relationships within SAP.

 - Strategic thinker who can balance short-ter

source_jobs.title: SAP ISU FICA Consultant
source_jobs.description:
Why Technitask

Technitask is a Canadian company and a trusted provider of IT management, systems integration, software delivery, and consulting services. Our expert team of SAP functional consultants, developers, project managers, data engineers, and security analysts create value for customers in the utilities, telecommunications, and public services sectors. We work with our clients to discover and define business problems, then collaborate with them to implement people, process, and technology solutions to realize benefits across the business.

• We bring SAP technical expertise across technical PMO, architecture, integration, data & reporting, security, custom development, system build & administration, and testing.

• We’ve worked with some of the biggest enterprises in utilities and the public sector such as Hydro One, Liberty Utilities, the Government of Canada, and the Province of Ontario.

• We’re a team of 50+ staff and a network of 200+ alumni with 17+ years of experience delivering SAP solutions.



What you'll need

Mandatory Qualifications

 - Good Understanding for Meter to cash Process in SAP ISU

 - In-depth knowledge of SAP ISU FICA Module, its functionalities, configurations, and its integration with other SAP ISU modules

 - Good knowledge of Business Master Data, Technical Master Data

 - Experience in setting up the Org structure, GL setup & Integration

 - Experience in Cash journal, clearing control, Account Assignment, and setting up direct debit

 - Strong understanding of Dunning, Collection, and Installment Plan processes

 - Setting up Main and Sub Transaction

 - Knowledge of Integration with Billing & FICO

 - Expertise in preparing the Functional Specification documents

 - Good understanding of C4C integration with SAP ISU

 - Basic understanding of SAP ISU Device Management and SAP ISU Billing modules

 - Should have working experience in at least 1 end to end to end Greenfield/brownfield SAP ISU/ SAP S4hana for Utilities implementation

 - Experience in Data migration between non-SAP and SAP ISU systems

 - Should have experience working in AS-IS To-BE Analysis and preparing Business Blueprint document

 - Should have experience in supporting the Data Migration phase in SAP ISU/SAP S4HANA for Utilities project



Who you are

 - Problem solver: You quickly formulate approaches from problem statements and target outcomes, undertake research using creative strategies, solve complex problems independently, and quickly learn and adapt to new situations.

 - Highly organized: You think in systems and process, create structure in ambiguity, and relentlessly prioritize to pursue what drives the business forward.

 - Team player: You effectively partner with others to get things done.

 - Clear communicator: You are an excellent writer (memos, slides) and excel at distilling complex information into simple messaging.

 - Outcomes driven: You collaborate with your clients, partners, and stakeholders to deeply understand their needs and ruthlessly prioritize to meet those needs.



Additional information

 - Contract role

 - Duration: 6 months

 - Hybrid (3 days onsite in London, ON)

 - Background check required



Our belief is that diversity & inclusion enables us to build solutions that work. We encourage applications from Indigenous peoples, racialized people, people with disabilities, people from gender and sexually diverse communities, and / or people with intersectional identities.



We also believe that unique experiences may not always fall along the beaten track. We’re dedicated to adding new perspectives to the team, so if your experience and skills can help us solve our customers’ problems, please consider applying.

source_jobs.title: SAP HCM Tester (ECC to S/4)
source_jobs.description:
Why Technitask

Technitask is a Canadian company and a trusted provider of IT management, systems integration, software delivery, and consulting services. Our expert team of SAP functional consultants, developers, project managers, data engineers, and security analysts create value for customers in the utilities, telecommunications, and public services sectors. We work with our clients to discover and define business problems, then collaborate with them to implement people, process, and technology solutions to realize benefits across the business.

• We bring SAP technical expertise across technical PMO, architecture, integration, data & reporting, security, custom development, system build & administration, and testing.

• We’ve worked with some of the biggest enterprises in utilities and the public sector such as Hydro One, Liberty Utilities, the Government of Canada, and the Province of Ontario.

• We’re a team of 50+ staff and a network of 200+ alumni with 17+ years of experience delivering SAP solutions.



Why we need you

We are looking for an SAP HCM software tester for an ECC to S/4 migration project with experience collaborating closely with developers to test and remediate defects in the next evolution of their SAP solutions. As a Tester, you will be helping us understand business needs, assess the quality of developed software, track defects, and work with the software testing and development teams to remediate defects and ensure that we deliver high-quality solutions.



What you’ll do

You will be a core part of the team working with our client and the SI to understand and test the solutions across SAP HCM. SuccessFactors is not in-scope.

 - Support the design and development of test scripts, test cases, design changes, and other types of documentation, such as end-to-end process testing for delta design changes and Fiori apps changes.

 - Execute manual testing (e.g., UAT, SIT, regression testing) and other testing as required.

 - Develop documentation to track defects, identifying potential issues and the steps to reproduce them.

 - Communicate with your software testing team and development the nature of defects and work with developers to remediate them.



Who you are

 - Experienced tester: You have 4+ years of experience in SAP software testing across UAT, SIT, and regression testing in SAP environments (e.g., Fiori, SAP GUI). You are experienced in conducting test scripts, documenting defects, and working with development teams to reproduce and remediate defects.
   
   - You have experience with the SAP HCM module.
   
   - Knowledge of test automation is ideal.

 - Problem solver: You have excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills.

 - Context-driven: You have a strong ability to effectively review and understand business and functional requirements, as well as understand the software being tested.

 - Team player: You effectively partner with others to get things done.

 - Clear communicator: You are an excellent writer and excel at capturing and communicating complex information into simple messaging.

 - Outcomes driven: You're able to work independently to execute structured manual testing and defect recording, as well as ad hoc testing to dig into scenarios and understand what's not working.



Additional information

 - Full-time or part-time role.

 - Flexible hours per week - choose your own level of engagement.

 - Remote, no travel, EST hours of operation, 8a.m. - 5p.m.

 - Background check required.



Our belief is that diversity & inclusion enables us to build solutions that work. We encourage applications from Indigenous peoples, racialized people, people with disabilities, people from gender and sexually diverse communities, and / or people with intersectional identities.



We also believe that unique experiences may not always fall along the beaten track. We’re dedicated to adding new perspectives to the team, so if your experience and skills can help us solve

source_jobs.title: Senior Technology Specialist/Developer (GIS)
source_jobs.description:
Why Technitask

Technitask is a Canadian company and a trusted provider of IT management, systems integration, software delivery, and consulting services. Our expert team of SAP functional consultants, developers, project managers, data engineers, and security analysts create value for customers in the utilities, telecommunications, and public services sectors. We work with our clients to discover and define business problems, then collaborate with them to implement people, process, and technology solutions to realize benefits across the business.

• We bring SAP technical expertise across technical PMO, architecture, integration, data & reporting, security, custom development, system build & administration, and testing.

• We’ve worked with some of the biggest enterprises in utilities and the public sector such as Hydro One, Liberty Utilities, the Government of Canada, and the Province of Ontario.

• We’re a team of 50+ staff and a network of 200+ alumni with 17+ years of experience delivering SAP solutions.



What you'll need

Mandatory Qualifications

 - University or college graduate in Computer Science or Geography with a post-bachelor's certificate/diploma in Application Development or GIS or related disciplines.

 - A minimum of five (5) years of experience providing guidance, support, and mentorship to team members.

 - Expert knowledge and proficiency with many of the following: ArcGIS 10/11.x Products Suite, PowerBuilder, Python, Arcade, Visual Studio (C++, VB, C#, ASP.NET http://ASP.NET).

 - Experience in GIS application development and programming using ArcGIS JavaScript API, 10/11.x ArcGIS Desktop SDKs, ArcGIS Pro 3.x, ArcGIS Enterprise 11.x products.

 - Experience with industry-standard technologies such as Java, XML, JSON, GEOJSON, JavaScript, HTML5, Web services, SOAP/REST, application servers, and/or Web servers.

 - Experience with SQL and Enterprise Geodatabases on SQL Server.

 - In-depth knowledge of object oriented design (OOD), object oriented programming (OOP), unified modeling language (UML), model driven architecture (MDA), and service oriented architecture (SOA).

 - In-depth knowledge of integrating complex applications on the desktop, web browser and across wide and local area networks is essential.



Nice-to-Have Qualifications

 - Demonstrated knowledge and experience with the following esri tools:
   
   - ArcGIS Online Assistant.
   
   - ArcGIS Enterprise Assistant.
   
   - Survey 123.
   
   - Experience Builder.
   
   - Knowledge of VertiGIS Web Studio.
   
   - Knowledge of VertiGIS Network Explorer.
   
   - High Availability Cloud computing in Microsoft Azure Experience with Azure DevOps.

 - MA or MSc in Computer Science or Geography

 - Associate or Professional-level certification on esri products or techniques.

 - Microsoft Azure development/administration certification
   
   

Who you are

 - Problem solver: You quickly formulate approaches from problem statements and target outcomes, undertake research using creative strategies, solve complex problems independently, and quickly learn and adapt to new situations.

 - Highly organized: You think in systems and process, create structure in ambiguity, and relentlessly prioritize to pursue what drives the business forward.

 - Team player: You effectively partner with others to get things done.

 - Clear communicator: You are an excellent writer (memos, slides) and excel at distilling complex information into simple messaging.

 - Outcomes driven: You collaborate with your clients, partners, and stakeholders to deeply understand their needs and ruthlessly prioritize to meet those needs.



Additional information

 - Contract role

 - Duration: 12 months

 - Hybrid (2 days onsite in Brampton, ON)

 - Background check required



Our belief is that diversity & inclusion enables us to build solutions that work. We encourage applications from Indigenous peoples, racialized people, people with disabilities, people from gender and sexu
